CVE-2020-11728.title: An issue was discovered in DAViCal Andrew's Web Libraries (AWL) t ...
CVE-2020-11728.summary: An issue was discovered in DAViCal Andrew's Web Libraries (AWL) through 0.60. Session management does not use a sufficiently hard-to-guess session key. Anyone who can guess the microsecond time (and the incrementing session_id) can impersonate a session.

CVE-2020-11729.title: An issue was discovered in DAViCal Andrew's Web Libraries (AWL) t ...
CVE-2020-11729.summary: An issue was discovered in DAViCal Andrew's Web Libraries (AWL) through 0.60. Long-term session cookies, uses to provide long-term session continuity, are not generated securely, enabling a brute-force attack that may be successful.
